index_descriptions.official: Browse official GDVN Geometry Dash lists including Classic, Challenge, Platformer, and Featured rankings.
index_descriptions.verified: Browse GDVN-verified Geometry Dash lists reviewed for the community.
index_descriptions.mirror: Browse mirrored Geometry Dash level lists preserved on GDVN.
index_descriptions.custom: Browse community-made Geometry Dash lists and level collections on GDVN.

official_descriptions.dl: Browse the official GDVN Classic List for ranked Geometry Dash demon levels, records, ratings, and player progress.
official_descriptions.pl: Browse the official GDVN Platformer List for ranked Geometry Dash platformer levels, records, ratings, and player progress.
official_descriptions.cl: Browse the official GDVN Challenge List for Geometry Dash challenge levels, rankings, records, and player progress.
official_descriptions.fl: Browse the official GDVN Featured List for featured Geometry Dash levels, records, ratings, and player progress.

list_seo.detail_description: {title} on GDVN with {count} Geometry Dash levels, records, rankings, and player progress.

descriptions.homepage: A website for the Geometry Dash Việt Nam community
descriptions.discord: Join the Geometry Dash Viet Nam Discord, add the GDVN bot to your server, and use current list data right in chat.
descriptions.community: Share, discuss, and connect with the Geometry Dash Việt Nam community
descriptions.lists: Browse public lists and manage your level collections.
descriptions.wiki: Explore the Geometry Dash Việt Nam Wiki with guides, rules, news, and updates

payment.redirect: You will be redirected to our payment portal

player_edit.success: Uploaded! It may take a while to take effect.
player_edit.name: Name must contain only letters and numbers.

clan_leave.confirm: Are you sure you want to leave this clan?

clan_update.success: Updated! This page will be refreshed.

clan_delete.confirm: Do you wish to delete this clan?

submission_submit.fill_required: Please fill in all required fields
submission_submit.cancel_confirm: Cancel submission? This cannot be undone

geode_mods.title: GDVN Geode Mod
geode_mods.description: Install the GDVN mod to view list info, join events, play 1v1 Versus, and use Battle Pass directly inside Geometry Dash.
geode_mods.install_hint: Restart Geometry Dash after installing if GDVN does not appear immediately.
geode_mods.popup_description: Your download has started. Install the downloaded file from Geode inside Geometry Dash.

list.title: In-game list info
list.description: See level status, rankings, and GDVN data without leaving the game.

activities.title: Events, 1v1 Versus, Battle Pass
activities.description: Join community activities and keep progress connected while playing.

otp.title: OTP account link
otp.description: Connect your GDVN account safely with a 6-digit code from the mod.

steps.1: After downloading nampe.gdvn.geode, open Geometry Dash, go to Geode settings, and click Install from file.
steps.2: Find the file you just downloaded.

pvp.play_meta_description: Enter the GDVN 1v1 Versus lobby for Geometry Dash PvP matchmaking, private invites, ranked Elo, and live matches.
pvp.match_meta_description: Watch a GDVN 1v1 Versus match with live Geometry Dash PvP progress, chat, level details, and ranked results.

landing.meta_title: 1v1 Versus - Geometry Dash PvP Arena | GDVN
landing.meta_description: Play GDVN 1v1 Versus for Geometry Dash PvP: ranked 1v1 matchmaking, private invites, live progress, Elo ratings, and weekly races.
landing.title: 1v1 Versus
landing.description: Queue into ranked Geometry Dash 1v1 PvP, invite a rival directly, race on the same challenge level, and climb the GDVN Versus Elo leaderboard.

matchmaking.title: Ranked 1v1 PvP
matchmaking.description: Find Geometry Dash opponents near your Elo and play a fair versus match on one shared challenge.

elo.title: Separate Elo ratings
elo.description: Classic and Platformer modes track their own PvP ratings, histories, and live progress graphs.

invites.title: Private versus invites
invites.description: Challenge a specific player, hide opponent info, play anonymously, and rematch after the duel.

weekly.title: Leaderboard and weekly race
weekly.description: Win ranked 1v1 matches to climb the PvP leaderboard and score weekly race points.

landing.rank_description: Your ranked wins, losses, Elo movement, and weekly race points all live in the Versus lobby, with match pages for every live or completed duel.
landing.how_title: Start a Geometry Dash versus match in minutes

install.title: Install the GDVN Geode mod
install.description: The mod connects your Geometry Dash progress to GDVN so 1v1 Versus can track live match progress.

queue.title: Queue ranked or send an invite
queue.description: Use matchmaking for a ranked PvP duel, or send a private 1v1 invite to a player you want to challenge.

play.title: Race the same level
play.description: Both players enter the same challenge, progress updates live, and the result updates your Versus history.

landing.mod_description: Install the latest GDVN Geode mod before playing 1v1 Versus inside Geometry Dash.

geode_alert.title: GDVN Geode mod required
geode_alert.description: To play 1v1 Versus, install GDVN Geode mod

required_submission.title: Manual submission required
required_submission.description: Submit and receive manual acceptance for {level} before continuing PvP matchmaking.

pvp.ban_pick_abort_request_confirm: Request to abort this match? The match will be cancelled only if your opponent agrees.
pvp.ban_pick_abort_agree_confirm: Agree to abort this match? This will cancel the match.
pvp.resign_confirm: Resign this match? Your opponent will receive the win.

report.title: Report match
report.description: Choose a reason before the report window closes in {time}.
report.description_active: Choose a reason. Reports stay open until 3 minutes after the match ends.
report.details_required: Please enter details for other reports.
report.limit_hint: You can report each match once.

pvp.sign_in_hint: 1v1 Versus matchmaking and invites are tied to your GDVN player account.
pvp.mode_hint: Classic uses percent progress. Platformer uses checkpoint count and a separate Elo.

rooms.title: Custom rooms
rooms.no_joined: You have not joined any rooms.

leaderboard.title: PvP leaderboard
leaderboard.description: Players are listed after their PvP rating is stable and they have 1 rated match in the last 7 days.
leaderboard.empty: No player currently meets the leaderboard requirements.
leaderboard.need_stable_rating: Play more ranked matches to stabilize your rating and unlock the leaderboard.
leaderboard.need_recent_match: Play 1 rated match in the last 7 days to be on the leaderboard.

weekly_race.title: Weekly PvP Race
weekly_race.description: Win ranked matchmaking matches to earn weekly points. The race resets every Monday in Vietnam time.
weekly_race.empty: No ranked wins this week yet.

tutorial.queue_description: Only ranked queue matches count for the weekly race. Private invites and unranked matches do not add points.
tutorial.score_description: A win gives +1 point. If a player resigns or forfeits, the opponent receives the point. Losses and draws give 0.
tutorial.reset_description: The leaderboard finalizes at the end of Sunday and a new race starts Monday at 00:00 Vietnam time.

clan_race.title: Clan PvP Race
clan_race.description: Every ranked match from clan members adds to the clan race. Clan credit is locked when the match ends.
clan_race.empty: No clan has scored ranked PvP points this week yet.

tutorial.queue_description: Ranked matchmaking matches count for your clan when you are in a clan at match end.
tutorial.score_description: A win gives the winner's clan +1 point. Every clan member in the match adds one match played.
tutorial.snapshot_description: Changing clans later does not move old race points or match counts.

elo_graph.title: Elo graph
elo_graph.empty: Play ranked matches to build your Elo graph.
elo_graph.need_stable_rating: Stabilize your rating to show the Elo graph.

pvp.elo_needs_recent_match: Play a ranked match to show Elo

rules.title: PvP rank rules
rules.description: Ranks unlock after your PvP Elo is stable in that mode.
rules.unlock_note: Classic and Platformer use separate Elo. A rank badge appears when that mode's rating deviation is below 150.

pvp.difficulty_band_hint: Levels are selected from Challenge List `cl` by rating.
pvp.search_slow_hint: Search is taking longer than usual. The rating range widens every 15 seconds.
pvp.queue_state_idle: Queue for a ranked match near your PvP rating

death_count.title: Deaths
death_count.description: Classic 1v1 deaths recorded during this match.
death_count.platformer_empty: Death count is only tracked for classic matches.
death_count.global_load_failed: Failed to load global death count
death_count.player_global_load_failed: Failed to load player global death count

system_message.match_end_win: {winner} won the match. Chat will remain open for {minutes} minutes, then it will be disabled.
system_message.match_end_draw: The match ended in a draw. Chat will remain open for {minutes} minutes, then it will be disabled.
system_message.match_cancelled: The match was cancelled. Chat will remain open for {minutes} minutes, then it will be disabled.
system_message.match_cancelled_platformer_hard_timeout: The platformer match ran longer than 2 hours and was cancelled. Chat will remain open for {minutes} minutes, then it will be disabled.
system_message.resignation_win: {resigning} resigned. {winner} won the match. Chat will remain open for {minutes} minutes, then it will be disabled.
system_message.resignation_end: {resigning} resigned. The match ended. Chat will remain open for {minutes} minutes, then it will be disabled.
system_message.level_change_requested: {requester} requested a level change. The level will change if the opponent agrees.
system_message.level_changed: {accepter} agreed to {requester}'s level change request. The match level changed to #{levelId}. Progress and timer were reset.
system_message.ban_pick_abort_requested: {requester} requested to abort ban-pick. The match will be cancelled if the opponent agrees.
system_message.ban_pick_aborted: {accepter} agreed to {requester}'s abort request. The match was cancelled.
system_message.ban_pick_auto_ban: {player} ran out of time. 1v1 Versus banned #{levelId}.
system_message.ban_pick_completed: Ban-pick completed. The match level is #{levelId}.

ban_pick.title: Ban-pick
ban_pick.description: Ban levels from the platformer pool. The last remaining level will be played.

pvp.anonymous_mode_hint: Hide your player name, avatar, clan, and profile link once a match is found.
pvp.hide_opponent_info_hint: Mask opponent names, avatars, clans, and profile links on this device.
pvp.chat_muted_description: Chat is muted on this device.
pvp.chat_disabled: Chat is disabled for this match.
pvp.match_found_hint: Confirm that you are ready. The match starts only after both players accept.

level_review.title: Level Review
level_review.access_description: Your account must have level reviewer access to review submitted levels.
level_review.heading: Review submitted levels
level_review.description: Retrieve one level at a time, review the requested areas, then submit a short summary and a detailed review file.
level_review.completed_banner: Review submitted. Retrieve another level when ready.
level_review.dashboard_reviews_description: Your assigned and completed level feedback reviews.
level_review.write_review_description: The brief review is shown directly in My Submissions. The detailed file is required.
level_review.review_file_placeholder: Choose PDF, text, image, or zip file
level_review.empty: Retrieve a level to start reviewing.

errors.file_too_large: Detailed review file must be at most 20MB
errors.file_type: Detailed review file type is not allowed

why_support.title: Why should you support Geometry Dash Việt Nam

support_team.title: Support the Team
support_team.description: A small single person team develops and runs Geometry Dash Việt Nam. Your support gives him the motivation to develop and maintain the website.

server_infrastructure.title: Server Infrastructure
server_infrastructure.description: Contributions go towards the servers for running the website.

self_sustaining.title: Keep Geometry Dash Việt Nam self-sustaining
self_sustaining.description: Your contributions help keep the site independent and completely free from outside sponsors.

highlighted_name.title: Highlighted name
highlighted_name.description: Stand out on the leaderboard with a flashy golden name.

animated_media.title: Animated Avatar and Banner
animated_media.description: Catch everyone's eye with a dynamic avatar and banner that bring your profile to life.

ads_free.title: Ads-free experience
ads_free.description: Enjoy an uninterrupted browsing experience with no ads across the website.

priority_queue.title: Access priority queue
priority_queue.description: Supporters enjoy reduced submission wait times, jumping ahead in the review line.

short_url.title: Short profile URL
short_url.description: Share your profile easily with a clean, professional link.

discord_role.title: Unlock exclusive Discord role
discord_role.description: Gain access to a special role on DLVN and partner Discord servers.

discord_notifications.title: Discord DM notifications
discord_notifications.description: Receive notifications directly through Discord DMs.

exclusive_events.title: Supporter-Only events
exclusive_events.description: Join special events reserved just for our cherished supporters — giveaways, secret games, and more surprises await!

autofill_level.title: Autofill level ID when submit
autofill_level.description: Automatically populate the level ID field when submitting a level, saving you time and effort.

rating_prediction.title: View rating prediction
rating_prediction.description: Get insights into the potential rating of your level before submission, helping you plan better.

early_access.title: Be the first to try our newest feature
early_access.description: Gain early access to new releases with new features before they go public!

advanced_filtering.title: Advanced Level Filtering
advanced_filtering.description: Filter levels with precision - search by top range, rating, level name, or creator. Find exactly what you're looking for!

more_coming.title: Umm... that pretty much it

onboarding.discord_desc: Join our Discord server to chat, get event notifications and interact with the community.
onboarding.geode_desc: Install the GDVN Geode mod to enjoy the full experience directly in Geometry Dash.
onboarding.geode_required: ⚠️ Geode mod is required to participate in events, tournaments and Battle Pass
onboarding.geode_feature_events: Join events and tournaments from in-game
onboarding.geode_feature_bp: Participate in Battle Pass and claim rewards directly
onboarding.support_desc: Server and development costs are funded by the community. Thank you for being part of GDVN.
onboarding.support_queue_desc: Get your records reviewed faster with priority queue
onboarding.support_clan_desc: Support your favourite clan — priority boost for all members
onboarding.social_desc: Add your YouTube and Facebook so others can find you. You can skip this step.
onboarding.done_desc: Your profile is ready. Start your GD journey.
onboarding.done_gift: Your profile is ready. You can update these details later from your profile settings.
onboarding.done_discord_desc: Connect Discord to unlock exclusive roles and features tied to your GDVN account.
onboarding.progress_desc: Finish setting up your profile to unlock the full GDVN experience

adblock.title: Please disable your ad blocker
adblock.desc: Ads help keep GDVN free for everyone. Please disable your ad blocker to continue.

index.title: Lists
index.subtitle: Browse public lists and manage your own level collections.

browse.heading: Browse lists
browse.hint: Public lists are discoverable by everyone.
browse.search_placeholder: Search public lists by title or description
browse.empty_browse_hint: Public lists will appear here once creators publish them.

official.heading: Official lists
official.hint: Official lists are maintained by the GDVN team.
official.search_placeholder: Search official lists by title or description
official.empty_browse_hint: Official lists will appear here once they are available.

verified.heading: Verified lists
verified.hint: Verified lists have been reviewed by the GDVN team.
verified.search_placeholder: Search verified lists by title or description
verified.empty_browse_hint: Verified lists will appear here once they are available.

mirror.heading: Mirror lists
mirror.hint: Mirror lists preserve collections mirrored from other sources.
mirror.search_placeholder: Search mirror lists by title or description
mirror.empty_browse_hint: Mirror lists will appear here once they are available.

own.sign_in_title: Sign in to create and manage lists
own.sign_in_desc: You need an account to create, edit, and populate your own lists.
own.sign_in_quickadd: Sign in to save level #{id} to one of your own lists.
own.quick_desc: Pick one of your existing lists below, or create a new one.
own.heading: Your lists
own.empty_desc: Create your first list to start organising levels.

starred.sign_in_title: Sign in to view starred lists
starred.sign_in_desc: Your starred lists are saved to your account.
starred.heading: Starred lists
starred.empty_desc: Star a public list to keep it here.

detail.level_lists_empty: No official or community lists include this level yet.
detail.starred_empty: No starred custom lists include this level yet.
detail.community_empty: No community posts about this list yet.

leaderboard.heading: {title} leaderboard
leaderboard.subhead_top: Total score is the sum of each record's weighted(x) final score after records are sorted per player by score(x).
leaderboard.subhead_rating: Total score is the sum of each record's weighted(x) final score after records are sorted per player by score(x).

records.heading: {title} record points
records.subhead_top: Each eligible record's final points are precalculated from weighted(x) when the leaderboard is refreshed.
records.subhead_rating: Each eligible record's final points are precalculated from weighted(x) when the leaderboard is refreshed.
records.select_player: Click the view button at the end of a row to inspect that player's record points.

staff.heading: Staff
staff.hint: Contact the people maintaining this list.

detail.delete_confirm: Delete this list? This cannot be undone.

edit.heading: Edit metadata
edit.community_hint: Allow community posts to be attached to this list.
edit.level_submission_hint: Allow signed-in users to submit levels into this list's review queue.
edit.staff_list_hint: Show the owner and collaborators on the public list page so viewers know who to contact.
edit.type_hint: Platformer lists only accept platformer levels and display base time instead of percentage minimums.
edit.mode_rating_hint: Levels are rated from 0 upward and shown from highest to lowest rated.
edit.mode_top_hint: Arrange levels in a custom order by dragging.
edit.item_sort_hint: Choose how levels are ordered in the manage view. This only changes the current list query and does not affect the public list page order. Mode default uses top ascending in Top mode and rating descending in Rating mode. Created at uses each item's creation time, including imported CSV timestamps.
edit.appearance_hint: Customize banner, colors, navbar branding, favicon, and level card styling for this list.
edit.background_color_hint: Optional hex color applied to the hero header and level cards.
edit.border_color_hint: Optional hex color applied to the hero header border and level cards.
edit.banner_url_hint: Optional image URL shown at the top of the hero header.
edit.favicon_url_hint: Optional image URL used for the browser tab icon on this list. Browsers may cache old favicons until refreshed.
edit.logo_url_hint: Optional image URL that replaces the navbar logo on this list page.
edit.asset_upload_hint: Upload an image file. Uploaded files fill this setting automatically; save changes to apply them.
edit.leaderboard_enabled_hint: Enable ranked player standings and the My record tab for this list.
edit.top_enabled_hint: Show each level's list position on level cards and on the level detail list badges.
edit.preview_hint: The hero above and the level card below update live as you change these settings.
edit.rank_badges_hint: Set badge thresholds for this list. Drag badges to reorder priority from highest to lowest.

add_level.heading: Add a level
add_level.hint: Only official Geometry Dash level IDs are accepted. Level names are fetched automatically.
add_level.csv_hint: Only `levelId` is required. Level names are fetched automatically. Add optional `createdAt`, `top`, `rating`, `minProgress`, and `videoId` columns. `createdAt` accepts an ISO timestamp such as `2024-01-05T12:00:00Z` or another valid date string. `top` is applied when the list is in top mode. `minProgress` uses percent for classic lists and base time in ms for platformers. `videoId` accepts a YouTube video ID or URL.
add_level.csv_example_hint: Headers are optional for ID-only imports. No name column is needed because level data is fetched automatically. Add `createdAt` to set the list item timestamp during import. Use `minProgress` for percent or platformer base time, and `videoId` for a custom showcase video.
add_level.csv_progress_status: Completed {completed}/{total} steps. Added {added}. Updated {updated}. Skipped {skipped}. Failed {failed}.
add_level.csv_progress_warning: Please leave this tab open while the import is running.
add_level.csv_progress_retry: Rate limited. Retrying every 1 second for up to 15 seconds.
add_level.csv_rate_limit_timeout: Rate limited for more than 15 seconds.
add_level.csv_close_warning: A CSV import is still running. If you leave this page, the import will stop.
add_level.csv_result_aborted: Import stopped. Added {added}. Updated {updated}. Skipped {skipped}. Failed {failed}. Invalid rows {invalid}.
add_level.csv_result: Added {added}. Updated {updated}. Skipped {skipped}. Failed {failed}. Invalid rows {invalid}.

levels.heading: Levels
levels.empty_owner: Add your first level using the form above.
levels.empty_pending_delete: All levels are staged for removal. Save to apply those deletions or discard your changes.
levels.empty_owner_manage: This list has no levels yet. Open Manage to add your first one.
levels.empty_visitor: This list has no levels yet.
levels.unavailable_desc: The level entry still exists in this list, but local metadata is unavailable.
levels.selection_hint: Shift-click a checkbox to select a range quickly.
levels.bulk_edit_hint: These edits stay local until you save them.
levels.min_progress_edit_hint: Click to set a custom minimum progress. Leave blank to use the level default.
levels.video_id_edit_hint: Click to set a custom video ID. Leave blank to use the level default.
levels.filter_empty_desc: Try a different name, creator, ID, rating, or pending-change filter.

new.heading: Create a new list
new.subtitle: Organise Geometry Dash levels into a shareable collection.
new.sign_in_desc: You need an account to create, edit, and populate your own lists.
new.description_placeholder: Describe what levels are in this list…
new.visibility_public_hint: Anyone can discover and view this list.
new.visibility_unlisted_hint: Only people with the link can view this list.
new.visibility_private_hint: Only you can see this list.
new.tags_hint: Separate tags with commas. Up to 10 tags.
new.type_hint: Choose Platformer if this list should only contain platformer levels.
new.community_hint: Allow community posts to be attached to this list. Enabled by default.
new.level_submission_hint: Allow signed-in users to submit levels into this list's review queue.
new.mode_rating_hint: Levels are rated from 0 upward and shown from highest to lowest rated.
new.mode_top_hint: Arrange levels in a custom order by dragging.

manage.title: Manage
manage.mirror_crawl_hint: Sync this mirror list from its configured source.
manage.pointercrate_crawl_hint: Sync positions, requirements, and videos from Pointercrate.
manage.aredl_crawl_hint: Sync positions and points from AREDL.

record_filter.heading: Leaderboard record filter
record_filter.platform_hint: Choose which device platform counts toward this list leaderboard.
record_filter.acceptance_hint: Choose which accepted records count toward this list leaderboard.
record_filter.refresh_rate_hint: Leave either field blank to avoid filtering on that side of the FPS range.

manage.banned_owner_hint: This list has been banned and is now private. Only a manager can edit or unban it.
manage.banned_manager_hint: This list is banned and private. Managers can still edit it here or remove the ban.
manage.banned_collaborator_hint: This list is banned and private. Collaborators can still view it here, but only a manager can edit or unban it.
manage.danger_hint: Ban and delete actions require you to type the current list name exactly before continuing.
manage.confirm_title_hint: Enter `{title}` exactly to enable these actions.
manage.confirm_title_error: Enter the current list name exactly to confirm this action.
manage.ban_confirm: Ban this list? It will be set to private and the owner will no longer be able to edit it.
manage.unban_confirm: Unban this list? The owner will be able to edit it again.

collaboration.search_hint: Owners can add admins and helpers. Admins can only add helpers when the setting below is enabled.
collaboration.admin_helper_toggle_hint: When enabled, list admins can add and remove helpers, but they still cannot grant admin access or delete the list.
collaboration.owner_hint: Full access. Can delete the list and transfer ownership.
collaboration.selected_member_existing: This player is already a collaborator with the role {role}.
collaboration.pending_hint: Invitations stay here until the player accepts or declines them.
collaboration.pending_your_hint: Accept this invitation to become a collaborator on this list.
collaboration.audit_hint: Recent collaborator, metadata, and level changes for this list.

changelog.heading: Changelog
changelog.hint: Build a public changelog from level-related audit entries, edit the text, then copy it or send it to Discord.
changelog.discord_hint: Set the Discord channel used when changelogs are published from this list.
changelog.stage_failed: Saved changes, but failed to stage changelog.
changelog.regenerate_confirm: Regenerate the body from selected audit entries? Manual body edits will be replaced.
changelog.sent_discord: Sent to Discord and marked as published.
changelog.empty: Select audit entries to create a changelog draft.
changelog.add_after_save: Add saved level changes to changelog

audit_detail.pointercrate_mirror_crawled: {actor} synced Pointercrate ({processed} checked, {inserted} added, {updated} updated, {removed} removed, {failed} failed).
audit_detail.aredl_mirror_crawled: {actor} synced AREDL ({processed} checked, {inserted} added, {updated} updated, {removed} removed, {failed} failed).

manage.unsaved_settings_hint: You have changes that have not been saved yet. Save them before leaving this page so the list settings stay in sync.
manage.unsaved_settings_close_warning: You have unsaved list settings. If you leave this page, those changes will be lost.
manage.unsaved_manage_changes_hint: Save once to apply pending settings and level changes to this list.
manage.unsaved_manage_changes_close_warning: You have unsaved list changes. If you leave this page, those changes will be lost.
manage.unsaved_level_edits_hint: Your level edits are still local. Save them to apply those changes to this list.
manage.unsaved_level_edits_dialog_description: Review the exact level changes before saving. The payload shown here is structured to match a future audit log entry.
manage.unsaved_level_edits_dialog_added_summary: This level will be added when you save.
This level will be added at {position} when you save.
manage.unsaved_level_edits_dialog_removed_summa: This level will be removed from {position} when you save.
manage.unsaved_level_edits_dialog_empty: There are no pending level changes.
manage.unsaved_level_edits_close_warning: You have unsaved level edits. If you leave this page, those changes will be lost.

formula.heading: Scoring formulas
formula.label: Scoring formulas
formula.record_score_hint: score(x) calculates the value used to sort each player's eligible records and assign position.
formula.weight_hint: weighted(x) returns the final score for the record. Its score input comes from score(x), and position is assigned after sorting the player's records by score(x).
formula.hint: score(x) determines record order; weighted(x) is stored as the final record points.
formula.preview_hint: Adjust sample inputs to inspect the formula output.
formula.record_score_preview_hint: Adjust sample record inputs to inspect score(x), the value used for sorting before position is assigned.
formula.weight_preview_hint: Adjust sample inputs to inspect weighted(x), the final score applied after sorting.
formula.combined_preview_hint: Adjust one sample record to inspect score(x) and weighted(x) together.
formula.preview_pending: Run preview to see the output.
formula.graph_hint: Keep the other inputs fixed and graph how the output changes along one selected variable.
formula.graph_pending: Run preview to generate the graph.
formula.final_point_hint_top: Top mode: final points are weighted(x).
formula.final_point_hint_rating: Rating mode: final points are weighted(x).
formula.platformer_time_note: For platformer lists, `time` and `baseTime` are measured in milliseconds (ms).

collaborator_invitation.title: Collaborator invitation
collaborator_invitation.subtitle: Review and respond to your invitation for this list.
collaborator_invitation.sign_in_required: Sign in to review this collaborator invitation.
collaborator_invitation.load_failed: Failed to load this collaborator invitation.
collaborator_invitation.accepted_hint: Your access has been updated. You can open the manage page or go back to the list.
collaborator_invitation.already_member_hint: This invitation has already been handled. You can open the manage page or return to the list.
collaborator_invitation.missing_hint: This invitation has already been handled or is no longer available.
